zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul於1293年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內時，她的父親Gui de Chatillon IV35歲，母親Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol25歲。她於1308年6月與Charles de Valois comte de Valois在法國波特-哈倫斯維安波爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年10月3日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年65歲，埋葬在法國瑟芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul于1293年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內时，她的父亲Gui de Chatillon IV35岁，母亲Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol25岁。她于1308年6月与Charles de Valois comte de Valois在法国波特-哈倫斯維安波爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年10月3日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年65岁，埋葬在法国瑟芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul was born in 1293, in Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Gui de Chatillon IV, was 35 and her mother, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, was 25. She married Charles de Valois comte de Valois in June 1308, in Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 October 1358, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Paris, Seine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul est née en 1293, à Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Gui de Chatillon IV, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Charles de Valois comte de Valois en juin 1308, à Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1358, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Seine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul 1293 in Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gui de Chatillon IV 35 und ihre Mutter Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol 25. Sie hat im Juni 1308 in Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Charles de Valois comte de Valois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1358 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Seine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul è nata il nel 1293 nel Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Gui de Chatillon IV, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Charles de Valois comte de Valois nel giugno 1308, nel Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 ottobre 1358, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paulが1293年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンで生まれた時，父Gui de Chatillon IVは35歳，母Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Polは25歳であった。1308年6月にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンポイティエルズでCharles de Valois comte de Valoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1358年10月3日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで65歳で死去し，フランスセアインパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul(이)가 1293년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gui de Chatillon IV(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1308년 6월 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 포이티어스에서 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 10월 3일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul nasceu em 1293, em Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Gui de Chatillon IV, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles de Valois comte de Valois em junho de 1308, em Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1358, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Paris, Seine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul родилась в 1293 г. в местности вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Gui de Chatillon IV было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois июнь 1308 г. в местности поитиирс, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 октября 1358 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, син, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul nació en 1293, en Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gui de Chatillon IV, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Charles de Valois comte de Valois en junio de 1308, en Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1358, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Paris, Seine, Francia.
